# This test verifies that MMA repair replaces decommissioning non-voters. All 10
# ranges start with 3 voters + 2 non-voters (s4,s5). Node 5 is decommissioning.
# MMA should add a replacement non-voter on s6 and remove the decommissioning
# non-voter.
#
# Expected outcome: all ranges back to 5 replicas (3V+2NV) with no replicas on
# the decommissioning node.

gen_cluster nodes=6 region=(a,b,c) nodes_per_region=(2,2,2)
----

# Create ranges with 3 voters + 2 non-voters.
gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=5 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1:*,s2,s3,s4:NON_VOTER,s5:NON_VOTER}:1
----
{s1:*,s2,s3,s4:NON_VOTER,s5:NON_VOTER}:1

set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

set_status node=5 membership=decommissioning
----

assertion type=conformance under=0
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
mma-repair:
leases#1: first: [s1=10, s2=0, s3=0, s4=0, s5=0, s6=0] (stddev=3.73, mean=1.67, sum=10)
leases#1: last:  [s1=10, s2=0, s3=0, s4=0, s5=0, s6=0] (stddev=3.73, mean=1.67, sum=10)
leases#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
replicas#1: first: [s1=10, s2=10, s3=10, s4=10, s5=10, s6=0] (stddev=3.73, mean=8.33, sum=50)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=10, s2=10, s3=10, s4=10, s5=0, s6=10] (stddev=3.73, mean=8.33, sum=50)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
hash: 125f055a04a22689
==========================
